bio: Jackson brings creative vision and strategic leadership to every project. With a passion for storytelling and deep understanding of the Pacific Northwest film industry, he ensures every production meets the highest standards of quality and creativity.
name: Jackson Lee

bio: Cristian is a master of visual storytelling, bringing cinematic quality to every frame. His expertise in lighting, composition, and camera movement creates visually stunning narratives that captivate audiences.
name: Cristian Oriak

bio: Lava transforms raw footage into polished masterpieces through expert editing, color grading, and post-production techniques. With an eye for detail and creative flair, every project receives the finishing touches it deserves.
name: Lava Sood

bio: Hans connects clients with the perfect production solutions, ensuring smooth communication and seamless project coordination from initial inquiry to final delivery.
name: Hans Potter

bio: Malka manages our social media presence, creating engaging content and building strong connections with our audience across all platforms.
name: Malka Martz-Oberlander
